columns.name: DTXSID
columns.dc:description: Unique identifier for the chemical substance in the EPA DSSTox database.

columns.name: SOURCE
columns.dc:description: The agency or database from which the value was retrieved.

columns.name: TOXVAL_TYPE
columns.dc:description: The type of toxicity value (e.g., LD50, NOAEL, RfD).

columns.name: TOXVAL_NUMERIC
columns.dc:description: The numerical value of the toxicity endpoint.

columns.name: TOXVAL_UNITS
columns.dc:description: Units of the toxicity value (e.g., mg/kg, mg/L).

columns.name: SPECIES_COMMON
columns.dc:description: Common name of the test species.

columns.name: EXPOSURE_ROUTE
columns.dc:description: Route of exposure (e.g., oral, inhalation, dermal).

columns.name: TOXICOLOGICAL_EFFECT
columns.dc:description: Description of the toxic effect observed.

columns.name: YEAR
columns.dc:description: Year of the study or assessment.

columns.name: QC_STATUS
columns.dc:description: Quality control status of the record.
